programme.title: Political Khiladi
programme.desc: When Kumaran, an ordinary citizen, abducts the chief minister of the state of Tamil Nadu, the whole nation wonders what could have compelled a seemingly innocent man to adopt such a drastic step.

programme.title: Born To Race Fast Track
programme.desc: Danny Krueger is a twenty-year old street racer who plays by his own rules. After winning a scholarship to the prestigious Fast Lane Racing Academy, Danny finds himself competing against some of the fiercest young drivers in the world. Tension soars on and off the track, and a terrible incident leaves Danny without a racing partner. Facing dismissal from the academy, Danny is forced to team up with an old rival. The pair must learn to set aside their differences as they vie for rookie spots on a professional racing team.

programme.title: Dandelion
programme.desc: Two of the most prosperous families in town – the Adrianovs and the Zeldovs - are preparing for the marriage of their children, an advantageous match and a union that promises to benefit both families' business interests. The day before the wedding celebrations are due to commence, the groom, Rodion Andrianov, meets a plain ‘dandelion' blonde girl Sonia under unusual circumstances when the elevator in which they are both traveling suddenly breaks down.

programme.title: Trust No 1
programme.desc: Officer Bradley (Douglas Rouillard) investigates murders believed to be part of a serial killing and quickly learns it's much bigger. With the body count rising, and nothing adding up, he turns to his last resort for help, his brother.

programme.title: A Picture to Remember
programme.desc: Masha is in love with Igor, her college mate, and wants to marry him, but he does not seem in much of a hurry to lead the girl to the altar.

programme.title: Chaahat Ek Nasha
programme.desc: Rashmi, an aspiring singer, idolises a pop sensation, Mallika, who once dated Rahul, the owner of RK Music. Later, Rashmi and Rahul fall in love with each other but Mallika is unable to accept this.

programme.title: Raja Ki Aayegi Baaraat
programme.desc: Raja rapes Mala and the court orders him to marry her. His family continues to torture Mala and attempts to kill her, but she manages to win over Raja and his family with her good deeds.

programme.title: Yamla Pagla Deewana
programme.desc: Dharam (Dharmendra) and Gajodhar (Bobby Deol) are a father-son con team skilled in tricking their unsuspecting fellow Indians. When a nonresident Indian, Paramvir (Sunny Deol), arrives from Vancouver claiming to be Dharam's long-lost son, the duo doesn't buy it, but they admire his strength and take him into their fold. Eventually Gajodhar falls for a young woman, Saheba (Kulraj Randhawa). But when Saheba's brothers disapprove of the match, Paramvir designs a plan for Gajodhar to win her back.

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: I'm LIVE presents three special episodes in commemoration of the end of the year and having a live audience for the first time in 2 years! The trilogy is composed of Christmas Special Year-End Special and New-Year Special and the guest of the Christmas Special Episode is Lee Jin ah. Lee Jin ah is a pop/jazz singer-songwriter known for her exceptional piano playing and composition capabilities. Her jazz-based music covering pop R&B hip-hop ballads and more has long been supported with enthusiasm by the public and also by fellow musicians and she always comforts the hearts of listeners with her genuine heartfelt message. In an effort to widen her artistry she made her debut as a film music director in May this year she made her debut as a film music director with Kids Are Fine. In this Christmas special edition Lee Jin ah performs The Wall Blocks Me Noisily Everywhere Awake Yum Yum Yum and her own version of Santa Claus Is Coming To Town. I'm LIVE allows musicians and fans to interact up-close within a distance of 1 meter. Numerous big names and rookies in the Korean music scene including Jannabi 10CM HYUKOH SE SO NEON CNBLUE Jeongmilla BIBI NIve and Lydia Lee have participated in the show. Also only those who have been fully vaccinated (defined as more than 14 days after the final vaccine dose) can participate in the live recording as an audience.

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: I'm LIVE presents three special episodes in commemoration of the end of the year and having a live audience for the first time in 2 years! The trilogy is composed of the Christmas Special the Year-End Special and the New-Year Special and the guest of the Year-End Special Episode is Kwon Jin ah. Kwon Jin ah is known for her tranquil and heartwarming voice that genuinely comforts our hearts. In February this year she released her first self-produced EP “The Way For Us” and showed off her capabilities as a songwriter and producer as well. In this episode Kwon Jin ah performs “KNOCK” “This Winter” and her solo version of “Hello Antenna Hello Christmas” the carol jointly released by musicians on the record label Antenna. Also famous for her live singing skills and ticket-selling power this artist is bound to melt our souls during this cold winter season. I'm LIVE allows musicians and fans to interact up-close within a distance of 1 meter. Numerous big names and rookies in the Korean music scene including Jannabi 10CM HYUKOH SE SO NEON CNBLUE Jeongmilla BIBI NIve and Lydia Lee have participated in the show. Also only those who have been fully vaccinated (defined as more than 14 days after the final vaccine dose) can participate in the live recording as an audience.

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: I'm LIVE presents three special episodes in commemoration of the end of the year and having a live audience for the first time in 2 years! The trilogy is composed of the Christmas Special the Year-End Special and the New-Year Special and the guest of the New-Year Special Episode is Juk Jae. Juk Jae is a guitarist-turned-singer-songwriter known for his lyrical and ambient songs with a guitar sound. Since his debut in 2014 he has collaborated with numerous singers including IU and Zion T and has also released many hit songs but he is still determined to show his transformation and growth through music. As part of that effort he hosts the audio show “Juk Jae's Night Time Studio” and also went on his first concert tour across Korea in November last year. In this New-Year Special Edition Juk Jae performs “Let's Go See The Stars” “Sky Dream” “One Another” and more to amaze our ears and souls. I'm LIVE allows musicians and fans to interact up-close within a distance of 1 meter. Numerous big names and rookies in the Korean music scene including Jannabi 10CM HYUKOH SE SO NEON CNBLUE Jeongmilla BIBI NIve and Lydia Lee have participated in the show. Also only those who have been fully vaccinated (defined as more than 14 days after the final vaccine dose) can participate in the live recording as an audience.

programme.title: Bloomberg Next Africa
programme.desc: A monthly deep dive into Africa's biggest stories through a Bloomberg lens. Global investors see the continent as one of the top areas for opportunity and growth, and some African nations are well-positioned to be global hubs for development. This show will discuss key steps taken to help deliver on Africa's quest of bridging the gap with global powers, and track capital flows and the direction of funds amid the underlying political, economic and social developments.

programme.desc: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly talk with Emmanuel Acho about his reinvention from NFL linebacker to media leader, his show "Uncomfortable Conversations" and his new effort, Speakeasy.

programme.title: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
programme.desc: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly sit with Erika Ayers Badan, former chief executive of Barstool Sports and current CEO of Food52, to discuss navigating turnarounds and how setbacks can fuel growth.

programme.title: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
programme.desc: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly interview Dallas Cowboys owner Jerry Jones on risk-taking, making bold trades and the Main Street philosophy that fueled his rise with the Cowboys.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer With Hannah Fry
programme.desc: Hannah Fry visits South Korea to explore how it became a cultural and tech superpower she trains with a Taekwondo black belt, learns kimchi secrets from a grandmaster and dives into pro gaming.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer With Hannah Fry
programme.desc: Hannah Fry reveals why ancient Greece was the birthplace of so many big ideas she decodes the Parthenon's geometry, sails the Aegean with ancient tools and is swept up in a riotous festival.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer With Hannah Fry
programme.desc: Professor Hannah Fry sets off on a global adventure, not just to see the world but to decode it Hannah seeks out local voices and quirks of history and geography that reveal what makes each place truly unique.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer With Hannah Fry
programme.desc: Hannah Fry explores how Iceland's geology shapes its culture she meets scientists studying lava flows and geothermal power, and travels ancient Viking trails.

programme.title: The Three Musketeers
programme.desc: It is a television adaptation of Alexandre Dumas' novel of the same name but with a Korean twist. Set in 17th century Joseon Dynasty, the story will follow the Crown Prince and his three guards in an unforgettable journey.

programme.title: Please dont Date Him
programme.desc: Home appliance developer Seo Jisung dreams of an easy life like a welldesigned algorithm. The “smart voice recognition AI refrigerator” she is in the process of developing accidentally gets combined with an antiterrorism super sensor chip that went missing from the National Intelligence Service Korea. Her refrigerator that couldn't even determine whether an ingredient was rotten suddenly identifies human lowlifes without even needing her to tell it to. This leads to revealing the truth about Jisung's fiancé. The man she thought of as an elite was actually a criminal. At the perfect timing, Jung Gukhee, a firefighter that seems too good to be true shows up in her life.

programme.title: W-Two Worlds Apart
programme.desc: A Love Story Between A Couple In Their Early Thirties. They Belong To The Same Era But Alternate Realities. A Surgical Resident Is Pulled Into The Webtoon World Of W, Which Was Created By Her Father, And Becomes Entangled In A Murder Mystery

programme.title: King in the Love
programme.desc: Set in the Goryeo dynasty, it tells the story of a young and ambitious monarch Won (Im Si-wan) with a desire to conquer, and two people who shape his destiny childhood friend Wang Rin (Hong Jong-hyun) and a beautiful young woman named San (Im Yoon-ah).

programme.title: Extra Ordinary
programme.desc: This is a fantasy romance drama about Dan Oh and Ha Ru, who one day find out that they are unimportant characters of a cartoon and change the storyline to make their relationship work out!

programme.title: Money Flower
programme.desc: Money Flower tells the story of people who are driven by greed. Kang Pil-Joo (Jang Hyuk) grew up at an orphanage, but he now works as a managing director of a legal team at a corporation.

programme.title: My Secret Terrius
programme.desc: Go Ae Rin suddenly loses her husband. A mysterious man, Kim Bon, lives next door. Kim Bon is a legendary NIS agent. He helps Ae Rin uncover a conspiracy, which husband became involved with.

programme.title: Ten Me
programme.desc: While in their early twenties, a medical school student, Oh Chang-min, and a dietitian, Oh Jin-hee, fall in love and marry despite his family's strong opposition. Chang-min comes from a family of wealthy doctors who believe Jin-hee is not good enough for him.

programme.title: Hide & seek
programme.desc: The Tangled Fates Of The Heiress Of A Cosmetics Company And A Woman Who Had To Achieve Everything On Her Own.

programme.title: Mother
programme.desc: A temporary teacher at an elementary school realizes that one of her students is being abused at home by her family.

programme.title: Har Har Bhakti
programme.desc: Listen to Har Har Bhakti Devotional songs and start your day with praise of gods and goddesses. These songs are composed to inspire reverence, devotion, and connection with the divine.

programme.title: Paapnaashini Ganga
programme.desc: Paapnaashini Ganga Is A Mythological Show Based On The Life Of Goddess Ganga. The Show Takes The Viewers On The Journey Of Birth And Life Of Ganga. The Reason Behind Ganga'S Birth Was To Destruct Evil Entities. The Powers Of Adishakti Made Mainavati Give Birth To A Female Child Who Became Known As Ganga. Devatas Considered Ganga'S Purity As A Weapon Which Could Destroy Evil Asuras. As A Humble & Virtuous Woman, Ganga'S Entire Life Was Full Of Hardships, Which She Led Washing Away The Sins Of All Of Humanity Without Any Discrimination. Ganga Had Sacrificed All Her Desires On The Altar Of Dharma And Led A Divine Life Full Of Welfare Of Humanity. The Show Is Visually Appealing With Strong Vfx Which Will Enhance The Viewers Experience.

programme.title: Laal Banarasi
programme.desc: The story highlights the exploitation happening with the ‘Bunkars' in Banaras, whose craft is appreciated all around the world, but they are paid peanuts by the traders. Amidst this, blooms a love story between the two opposites - Gauri, a bunkar and Garv, a trader. The story is of Gauri who belongs to the bunkar community facing series of incidents which destroys her family and swears to bring about a change in their life and stop the exploitation by directly trading the sarees. This becomes a battle with traders creating hurdles in her life but she is unstoppable.

programme.title: Bhabhi Ke Pyare Pritam Hamare
programme.desc: Bhabhi Ke Pyare Pritam Humaare Is A Light-Hearted Celebrity Chat Show Hosted By One Of India'S Most Famous Rj– Pritam Singh. In Each Episode, He Will Welcome Top Female Celebrities From The Entertainment Industry Who Have Played The Roles Of Bhabhi'S & Bahu'S On-Screen, Adding A Pinch Of Glamour To The Show. These Female Celebrities Will Talk About Their Real-World, Tell Their Untold Stories And Reveal How They Live Off-Camera. What'S More? The Episodes Of This Chat Show Will Have An Enthralling Line-Up Of Gag Artists, Activities/Games & Comedy Segments, Along With The Barrel Of Laughs – Pritam.

programme.title: Dahej Daasi
programme.desc: This story is about a 19yr old girl named Chunari, who dreams of marriage and a happy family. However, she becomes entangled in the chains of deceit, finding herself on the path to becoming a Dahej Dasi, which is a tradition still prevalent in the backward regions of Rajasthan. The show unfolds into a compelling drama of tradition versus rebellion, love versus oppression.

programme.desc: In today's Kharcha Paani, we explain what will happen if Iran blocks the Strait of Hormuz, through which nearly 50% of India's oil imports pass. With oil prices rising and India importing about 85% of its crude, will petrol and diesel prices increase?

programme.title: Social List

programme.title: Sehat

programme.title: The Cinema Show
programme.desc: In today's episode of The Cinema Show, we share a big update on Salaar 2 starring Prabhas. We also discuss Yash's decision to release Toxic with Dhurandhar 2 and the real reason behind the sudden trailer launch cancellation.

programme.title: Rajdhani
programme.desc: Big political buzz in Bihar as talks grow about JDU leader Nitish Kumar's son, Nishant Kumar, entering the Rajya Sabha. BJP's new list names Nitin Nabin, while Pawan Singh is left out again, adding more drama to the 2026 elections.

programme.title: Aasan Bhasha Mein
programme.desc: The US launched Operation Epic Fury and Israel carried out Operation Roaring Lion, claiming the killing of Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei and many top leaders. programme.title: Netanagri

programme.title: Kill me, Heal me Ep.14
programme.desc: Do Hyun regains his laughter while spending time with Ri Jin's family. Soon Young encourages him to pursue Ri Jin and shows him photos of Ri Jin and Ri On as children. Meanwhile, Do Hyun's repressed memories of the basement resurface, and he meets the personality “Nana.” Chae Yeon calls off her engagement with Gi Joon.

programme.title: Kill me, Heal me Ep.15
programme.desc: Do Hyun begins to recall his lost memories, while Ri On decides to investigate who was behind Ri Jin's childhood abduction. Ri Jin tries to recall her own past for Do Hyun's sake, but he worries for her. Hwa Ran panics when Do Hyun declares he'll make her illness public.

programme.title: Kill me, Heal me Ep.16
programme.desc: Do Hyun takes Ri Jin on a farewell trip aboard the Snow Flower Train. Shin Hwa Ran plots to ensure Do Hyun stays with Seung Jin Group, while Chairwoman Seo Tae Im meets privately with Ri Jin.

programme.title: Kill me, Heal me Ep.17
programme.desc: Do Hyun and Ri Jin recall the shocking truth about their past and fall into panic. Tae Im becomes busy trying to suppress an article about Jun Pyo, while Hwa Ran smiles in satisfaction. Meanwhile, Do Hyun learns from Tae Im the full story behind the fire at the Seung Jin mansion 21 years ago.

programme.title: Kill me, Heal me Ep.18
programme.desc: Gi Joon starts gathering all available information on Do Hyun. Ri Jin and Ri On calmly handle the sudden appearance of all of Do Hyun's personalities. Meanwhile, Do Hyun receives full authority from Tae Im to prepare for the shareholders' meeting, prompting Gi Joon to meet Young Pyo to strike a new deal.

programme.title: Kill me, Heal me Ep.19
programme.desc: Gi Joon and Chae Yeon are shocked to learn that Do Hyun has dissociative identity disorder, while Ri On feels uneasy about Ri Jin returning to Do Hyun's side. Meanwhile, Perry Park bids Ri Jin farewell, and traces of a new personality, “Mr. X,” begin to emerge.

programme.title: Kill me, Heal me Ep.20
programme.desc: Do Hyun hesitates to face the truth that Jun Pyo may have been behind Ri Jin's mother's death. Mr. X advises Do Hyun to confront his past for the sake of his future. Meanwhile, one by one, Do Hyun's personalities appear to say goodbye, and Ri Jin finally faces her childhood self.

Dragonero!

programme.title: Juggler
programme.desc: Super Hungry" is a comedic adventure showcasing Jerry's insatiable appetite and Jane's playful attempts to feed him. Jane's idea of using "Hunger Syrup" leads to unexpected consequences as Jerry accidentally consumes the entire bottle, causing his hunger to intensify. A hilarious chase ensues as Jerry devours everyt_hing in sight, leaving Jane both amazed and exhausted. With a clever twist involving chili and a bucket of water, Jerry's hunger is finally satiated, resulting in laughter and relief for both characters

programme.title: BirthdayCake
programme.desc: Jerry playfully disrupts Jane's cleaning routine by scattering toys and bowls. He surprises Jane by juggling the toys and later the crockeries, showcasing his dexterity and coordination. Jane joins in the fun, and they _hinage in a playful juggling act together, creating a harmonious and entertaining moment in their home.

programme.title: Nanobots Byte
programme.desc: When Angie's garbage-eating nanobots escape from the lab, the Secret Lab Kids must stop them before they turn the planet into one giant feeding ground.

programme.title: Attack of the 50 Foot Shaq
programme.desc: Keb, a friend of Shaq, that he has mentored since he was a little kid, is now studying robotics in college and he has made him a special birthday gift: a 50-foot-tall Shaq robot! When the Shaq-Bot “breaks out” of the straps securing it and walks off the back of Biggie D while he's transporting to the garage, he, Himari, Fleming, and Keb has to find a way to get the runaway robot back under control.

programme.title: Baby Sitting
programme.desc: In a whirlwind of imagination, Jerry's longing for an amusement park leads him on a playful adventure in his own home. From bouncing on the sofa to swinging from curtains and riding a makeshift fan merry-go-round, Jerry and Jane find joy and laughter in their imaginative escapades. Ultimately, they learn to embrace the magic of their own imagination, creating their very own amusement park wit_hin the walls of their home

programme.title: Amusement park
programme.desc: ," Jane and Jerry _hinage in a playful dance-off, constantly trying to one-up each other. Their antics escalate as they use various props to outdo the other, leading to a comical series of mishaps. However, when their beloved music player breaks, they realize the power of their shared passion for music and come together to create their own joyful tune, ending on a heartwarming note of friendship and celebration.

programme.title: Bubble Menace
programme.desc: Jane is standing in the backyard holding a bubble stick, a container of bubble solution, and a bigsmile on her face. She dips the stick into the solution and starts blowing bubbles.Jerry runs over to her, excited to join in on the fun.Jane shows Jerry how to dip the stick and blowgently, and soon they are both surrounded by a cloud of bubbles.

programme.title: Drone Attack
programme.desc: Jerry's mischievous behavior leads to a mess of toys and books scattered around the living room. Jane tries to catch the thrown objects but ends up getting hit herself. However, Jerry realizes Jane's sadness and starts helping her collect the items. They work together, with Jerry attempting to balance a pile of books and Jane using a box to collect the toys. After some mishaps, they successfully gather everyt_hing, but when the box breaks, they find themselves buried under the pile. They laugh together, realizing the joy in their shared experience.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster Paln
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Invention Story
programme.desc: Carrot Town was once a low-tech community with candles, wind-up clocks, and woodburning stoves. Then a fluke came along – a free-thinking rabbit named SILAS HOPNER who invented a machine that could turn carrots into a fuel called Carrotsene (like kerosene).

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Cubs
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu Cubs is a brand-new edutainment series showing children that learning can be fun. At this scenic Pine Tree Kindergarten, all the cubs observe the world in their own creative and wondrous ways. Here you will learn everything from the value of friendship to exploring the mysteries of science and language.Bablu Dablu Cubs will teach kids how to help others while preparing themselves for life in this beautiful world. This show is a colorful paradise for kids, teeming with adventures around every corner.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Autumn Awosomeness
programme.desc: Set during the harvest, this season finds Briar, Bramble, and their friends spending every day gathering as much food as possible for the upcoming winter. While they look for mushrooms, corn, and of course Bramble's favorite – honey, they have to keep a sharp eye out for the pesky Logger Vick! Fun falls with every leaf this season as the crew finds new adventures with some new friends. Follow the funny and join in on the laughter as it echoes throughout Pine Tree Mountain.

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie's play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There's just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Gummy lives in an apartment with his friend Harry the Chameleon, while his other friend Kala the Cat hangs out in a ninja dojo on the roof. Together they go on wild and wacky adventures in their building and hometown. Enjoy the fun and crazy adventures!

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb's eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn't think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn't think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb's world. Ebb and Flo's home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn't Be Better!

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: Zitron joins a friendly snow fight between the cars, but soon uses his Zitronic to trap them in ice cubes!

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: Zitron derails a fun basketball game between the cars. Rodeo and Booster transform into Robo to teach him a lesson.

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: A UFO steals everything on its path in Car City! Robo teams up with Rocky to stop the UFO and Zitron.

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: Zitron challenges the cars to a strength contest, but turns Marley into the Hulk, and he' s completely out of control!

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: Sweet tooth Om Nom is wandering Around the world, eats a lot of candies and tries to find his Dream job. Watch his adventures and solve different puzzles on the way!

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they' re learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: The Adventures of Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent is about a young spy with a whole lot to learn, who is paired with a very unlikely partner... his mom!

programme.title: Tom' s Car Wash
programme.desc: Baby Hector' s spent the afternoon jumping in puddles the mud got his blades stuck! Time for a trip to the carwash.

programme.title: Tom' s Car Wash
programme.desc: Chuck's Cherry picker arm is rusty and stiff. He goes to Tom's Car Wash to get cleaned up and oiled up!

programme.title: Tom' s Car Wash
programme.desc: Baby Amber got all dirty while playing with Baby Matt. Tom giver her an emergency carwash and a polish.

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn' t! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can' t help being sucked in by Moose' s relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: GATTU
programme.desc: In a Fairy Kingdom,there is a group of righteous Five-Spirit Guards who is protecting the locals from evils. They got magic power, for which is GG Bond always dreaming. programme.title: Mid
programme.desc: Veteran actor, Naseeruddin Shah, explores the many untold stories of Indian cricket. He recalls the history of the game match highlights. Sportsmanship, stadiums, hits and misses, and many more. In his unique narrative style, Naseeruddin Shah brings alive the humorous side of the game, along with undocumented anecdotes and quirky trivia. The show also features many personalities who narrate cricketing experiences and stories including Shashi Tharoor, Narl Contractor, Bishan Singh Bedi and Charu Sharma amongst others

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Safarnama
programme.desc: Safarnama is more than just a mere journey one wants to complete just to check out that one task from the ‘ToDo List”. It is something just one of its kind. In Safarnama, we are up for a soulfulfilling journey with Ankit Siwach that is to begin in Mumbai and cease at Ladakh. This journey is to witness numerous unseen moments and unfelt experiences via a thrilling, adventurous route. It isn't just about navigating roads using GPS but more of digging deeper into the beauty of India to understand life better.

programme.title: Lost Recipes
programme.desc: Lost Recipes is all about the food which is diffused into the pages of history and the rediscovery of a tradition that once was. Our host Aditya Bal is on a quest to unearth the once-popular culinary traditions through thirteen regions in India.But these recipes are no longer found in cookbooks, old or new, and seem to have evolved with time. Aditya must turn back the clock and wade through folk and lore to find the original, Lost Recipes.

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha
programme.desc: After the resounding success of the first two seasons, EPIC Channel presents a revamped avatar of its Raja Rasoi series. EPIC Channel's Raja Rasoi series - titled Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha - stands true to its name. While the lore and love of Indian food remains just as passionate, the new season presents a discovery oriented show format that transforms table-top cooking into an exciting food lab. Featuring renowned chef Ranveer Brar, the show will take you to his retreat – an old-world bungalow basking in the laidback vibe of Goa and then along on a ride nostalgia and rediscovery both personal and culinary. Ranveer's passion for culinary art makes him a perfect fit as the host for the latest season of the food series. He has dedicated this experimental streak and passion for food to his mentor – Munir Ahmed, a quaint, ordinary yet passionate food enthusiast from the gullies of Lucknow who greatly influenced Brar while growing up in his hometown.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: In the porous limestone of Canadas West Coast, great forces are at work under the ground, building and eroding the underground into fantastic shapes. In this episode well witness Georges explorations of these massive underground cave systems.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Stormchasing developed in Australia in the same period the 1990s as it developed in the American Midwest. In the first week of December the height of storm season in Australia, we plan to travel with Jimmy Deguara, the most experienced of Australian stormchasers.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Italy is one of the very few nations in the world that regularly gets three major extreme natural phenomena volcanos, flooding, and avalanches. Eastern flanks of the volcano to slip by up to two metres, and many houses on the flanks of the volcano experienced structural damage. The eruption also completely destroyed the Rifugio Sapienza, on the southern flank of the volcano. The Rifugio was the site of a cable car station which had previously been destroyed in the 1983 eruption both have now been rebuilt. The most recent eruption was in November 2006.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Definitely our wildest episode so far. Heres the deal: Mt.Elgon is an 14,000 foot volcano in eastern Kenya. We propose a safari/ascent of the dormant volcano. Heres the first kicker:High on the the flanks of the volcano is Kitum Cave a cave created by the most unique form of erosion Elephant Erosion. For millennia elephants have been going into the cave to carve it out with thir tusks in order to eat the salty rock.Heres the second kicker: the cave is thought to be the home of the Ebola Marberg virus the worlds most deadly virus.So heres the plan: We are going enter the cave, at night, wearing full Bio-Hazard suits to protect us from the virus.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: In June of next year we plan to intercept the Monsoon as it hits southern India and makes its way north along the western shore past Goa and Mumbai up to Delhi.This most famous of torrential rainy seasons drops as much as 40 feet of water on parts of the parched sub-continent.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: The Land of Ice and Fire Iceland is a fascinating and ruggedly demanding country - a perfect subject for exploration by Angry Planet. The northern island nation has many of the wild features that we love volcanoes, glaciers, avalanches, mudslides, big waves, and extreme marine weather. All that plus weird red and green lights dancing around in the winter sky!

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Early September of 2008 saw radical imagery on the hurricane maps of the Atlantic four named tropical storms, swirling in a train across the ocean. Angry Planet was there as three of them made landfall as hurricanes in the US. We filmed gustaf in Louisiana, Hanna in North Carolina, then flew with the USAF Hurricane Hunters into Ike over cuba, and met it again as it made a wild destructive landfall in Galveston, Texas.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: No-one creates eco-disasters on quite the scale of the former Soviet Union. In Uzbekistan, the Aral Sea, once one of the largest freshwater lakes in the world, has seen its waters diverted, so that it has shrunk to 1/6 its previous size. In Crimea, a mountain has been carved into a james bondian submarine base. In northern Ukraine, the Chernobyl nuclear site has been reduced to a radioactive wasteland.

programme.sub-title: Fusion: Harnessing the Power of Stars

programme.title: Breakthrough

programme.title: Animal Society
programme.desc: A diverse group of distantly related families and species sharing a few common traits, marine invertebrates include polyps, octopus and jellyfish.

programme.title: Safari Flix

programme.title: What Did I Find?! – Dissecting Snowy Owl Pellets!
programme.desc: Coyote dissects snowy owl pellets to uncover the tiny skeletons inside. This educational episode reveals what owls eat and how they digest it.Coyote challenges a tortoise to an all-you-can-eat green bean buffet. Hilarity ensues as the slow-and-steady eater powers through a feast.

programme.title: Eaten Alive – Human Hands vs. Piranha!
programme.desc: How does it feel to be bitten by piranhas? Coyote tests this freshwater legend with his own hands—and the results are intense.Slow motion never looked this painful. Coyote's hand meets a snapping turtle's jaw in a frame-by-frame breakdown of force and reaction.

programme.title: Bitten by 3 Attack Dogs!
programme.desc: In a dramatic training exercise, Coyote allows himself to be bitten by three trained attack dogs. Protective gear is tested to the limit.Ever wanted to catch fireflies and make a glow lantern? Coyote shows how to safely observe these luminous bugs and builds a bug-powered lantern.

programme.title: $10,000 Animal Challenge – Who Will Win?!
programme.desc: With a $10,000 prize on the line, Coyote and his crew take on a wild animal challenge to see who can find, catch, and identify the most species.Ten turtles in one day? Coyote takes on the shell-filled challenge with nets, patience, and muddy hands to see how many species he can spot.

programme.title: Not Again! – 10,000 Bees vs. Face
programme.desc: 10,000 bees on one face?! Coyote goes viral again in this nerve-wracking attempt to see if he can stay still long enough to survive.

programme.title: Bitten by a Giant Asian Centipede!
programme.desc: With its venomous fangs and lightning speed, the giant Asian centipede is nightmare fuel. Coyote takes a bite and regrets it instantly.

programme.title: Hognose Snake – Will It Bite?!
programme.desc: Hognose snakes are known for their bluffing. Coyote tries to provoke a bite to reveal whether this quirky serpent is all hiss and no bite.A chainsaw meets a mysterious box in this over-the-top unboxing. Coyote takes power tools to presents in a gift-opening like no other.

programme.title: Would You Enter a Snake Infested Forest?
programme.desc: Would you dare enter a forest crawling with snakes? Coyote ventures into one of the world's densest snake habitats to test courage and caution.It's frog vs turtle in a race to the water. Coyote hosts this hilarious and chaotic showdown between a leaping frogman and a speedy cooter.

programme.title: Cutest Baby Rhino Ever!
programme.desc: The baby rhino may be adorable, but it still has wild instincts. Coyote bonds with one in a rescue center and learns about their conservation.What's the smallest chameleon in the world? Coyote discovers just how tiny it really is—and how it avoids being noticed in the wild.

programme.title: Spitting Cobra vs. My Face!
programme.desc: Face to fangs—Coyote encounters a spitting cobra. He tests how accurate its venom aim is and how to respond to this rare defense tactic.Coyote participates in a controversial conservation procedure: trimming a rhino's horn. He explains the reasons, risks, and impact of the act.

programme.title: Would You Survive This Obstacle Course Challenge?!
programme.desc: Can you survive this wilderness obstacle course? Coyote takes on a challenge of physical grit and wild surprises in this action-packed adventure.One of the most dangerous snakes alive, the black mamba is captured and relocated safely with Coyote's help. A heart-pounding rescue mission.

programme.title: The Dire Wolf Is Alive – Extinction Reversed?
programme.desc: Could dire wolves still roam Earth? Fossil findings and modern sightings are explored in this thrilling, speculative episode.In one of his wildest challenges ever, Coyote dives into an unpredictable stunt. He calls it the craziest thing he's ever done—and he means it.

programme.title: Step Inside a Volcano!
programme.desc: Mark steps into an actual volcano! With heat, gases, and lava rock all around, this geology-heavy episode explores Earth's fiery power firsthand.The giant catfish is a powerhouse predator. Coyote takes a bite and breaks down how these fish use their strength to dominate waterways.

programme.title: 100,000 Endangered Bats vs. Deadly Fungus!
programme.desc: A deadly fungus threatens over 100,000 endangered bats. Coyote investigates the science, symptoms, and species affected by white-nose syndrome.

programme.title: The new Porsche 911 GT3 R
programme.sub-title: Design_en - The new Porsche 911 GT3 R - Design
programme.desc: The turbocharged three-litre flat-six in the new 911 GTS delivers 353 kW (480 PS). Maximum torque is 570 Nm, an increase of 20 Nm over its predecessor. Zero to 100 km/h takes just 3.3 seconds (911 Carrera 4 GTS: Fuel consumption combined (NEDC) 10.5 – 9.7 l/100 km, Fuel consumption combined (WLTP) 11.4 – 10.6 l/100 km, CO₂ emissions combined (NEDC) 240 – 222 g/km, CO₂ emissions combined (WLTP) 259 – 240 g/km) in the 911 Carrera 4 GTS Coupé with the eight-speed Porsche dual-clutch transmission (PDK): three tenths faster than its predecessor. A seven-speed manual transmission with a particularly short throw is available for all 911 GTS models as an alternative to the PDK.

programme.title: From concept vehicle to full-production ID
programme.sub-title: From concept vehicle to full-production ID. Buzz - How was the electric Microbus created
programme.desc: The new model line's assistance systems perfect ease of driving and safety. Included as standard in the ID. Buzz and ID. Buzz Cargo is the ‘Car2X' local warning system, which utilises signals from other vehicles and the transport infrastructure to spot hazards in real time. Also included as standard: the ‘Front Assist' emergency braking function and, in the MPV, the ‘Lane Assist' lane-keeping assistant. With new software, new assistance functions are also making their way into the ID. family. Available as an option is ‘Travel Assist with swarm data', which facilitates partially automated driving across the entire speed range and, for the first time, assisted lane-changing on the motorway. Also new: the ‘Memory Function' for automated parking on a previously saved route.

programme.sub-title: Digitalized lighting technologies in the Audi A8
programme.desc: Light technology is steadily creating a wider range of possibilities and perspectives, from added safety for the driver, to external communication and individualization. Systematic light digitization raises the customer experience to a whole new level.

programme.title: New 2023 Range Rover Sport Product Highlights_en
programme.sub-title: New 2023 Range Rover Sport Design Reveal Film
programme.desc: The New Range Rover Sport has made its global premiere with a dramatic world-first climb up a flooded dam spillway in Iceland. The epic ascent saw New Range Rover Sport resist the surging torrent of water flowing down the ramp of the Karahnjukar Dam – the biggest of its kind in the world – at a rate of 750 tonnes per minute. A loss of traction risked plunging down the perilous 90m drop at the base of the spillway to the valley floor below. The successful spillway ascent was screened for the first time at an exclusive launch event at Jaguar Land Rover's Advanced Product Creation Centre at Gaydon, UK. Official James Bond stunt driver Jessica Hawkins was behind the wheel as the New Range Rover Sport demonstrated its grip, traction, performance and composure, completing the latest in a series of challenges for Land Rover's luxury performance SUV. Previous feats include a record-setting hill-climb at Pikes Peak, a first recorded crossing of the ‘Empty Quarter' desert in the Arabian Peninsula and a first ascent of the 999 steps to Heaven's Gate in China, in 2018.

programme.title: Hispano Suiza showcases its history in the Peralada Castle Museum
programme.desc: The history of Hispano Suiza is showcased, for the very first time, in the Peralada Castle Museum (Girona, Spain) where visitors will be able to contemplate the past and present of the legendary car brand founded in 1904 by Damián Mateu and Mark Birkigt. The Hispano Suiza Room will close the usual tour of the Peralada Castle Museum. After years of researching to gather the largest number of pieces and objects related to its history, Hispano Suiza becomes part of this important collection. The Hispano Suiza exhibition encompasses a journey through various decades: from the beginning of the 20th century, when Hispano Suiza was founded, to the present day. After passing through a luxurious hall, the public will be able to visit a recreation of the offices of Damián Mateu and Mark Birkigt, where countless business and technical ideas, emerged and took shape, turning Hispano Suiza into a point of reference, for luxury, comfort and technical solutions. In this area, the original painting 'Dame with a mink' by Ramon Casas takes pride of place: it was used as an illustration on the company's original shares.

programme.title: TechDay Digital Light
programme.sub-title: Digital Future Lighting - TechDay Digital Light - Digital Future Lighting
programme.desc: Safety and customer satisfaction come first at Audi. They are part and parcel of the success of the company with the four rings. In that context, light technology is steadily growing more important and creating a wider range of possibilities and perspectives, from added safety for the driver, to external communication and individualization. Systematic light digitization is making all of this possible. It is particularly visible in the new Audi A8: the forward-looking Digital Matrix LED headlights and digital OLED rear lights raise the customer experience to a whole new level: for the first time in any Audi model, light is completely digitized. The car can be individualized even further through its digital OLED rear lights. The Digital Matrix LED headlights also include three new functions: advanced traffic information, a lane light with direction indicator lights on highways, and an orientation light on country roads. These features not only demonstrate Audi's “Vorsprung durch Technik,” they also add value.

programme.title: 2022 Peugeot 308
programme.sub-title: Crash & Safety Tests - 2022 Peugeot 308 - Crash & Safety Tests
programme.desc: The sixth generation Opel/Vauxhall Astra and third generation Peugeot 308 are both based on the Stellantis EMP2 platform and, unsurprisingly, score very similarly across all four areas of assessment. Both the offset test and the full-width crash test highlighted marginal chest injury protection for average male and small female drivers, and neither car was equipped with a centre airbag for far-side crash protection, a countermeasure which is increasingly common on modern cars. Both cars offer plenty of crash avoidance technology but do not include some of the latest advancements introduced in the market. The cars' four-star ratings apply also to their PHEV variants.

programme.title: 2022 Volvo C40 Recharge
programme.sub-title: Crash & Safety Tests - 2022 Volvo C40 Recharge - Crash & Safety Tests
programme.desc: The fully electric Volvo C40 Recharge has been awarded a five-star safety rating in the 2022 Euro NCAP tests, joining its siblings in the Volvo Cars line-up as one of the safest cars on the road today. The rating continues Volvo Cars' five-star streak in Euro NCAP testing, as all tested Volvo models on sale today received five stars in their respective Euro NCAP assessments. The C40 Recharge scored especially well on occupant safety and driver assist systems, helped by one of the most extensive standard safety offers in its segment. Among many other scenarios, these safety technologies help drivers detect and avoid collisions, remain in their lane and reduce the impact of accidentally running off the road.

programme.title: Volvo Cars and Epic Games bring real-time photorealistic visualisation
programme.desc: To offer its customers the best possible user experience, Volvo Cars is bringing photorealistic visualisation technology into its next generation of electric cars through a new collaboration with Epic Games. The companies are teaming up to bring Epic's Unreal Engine game engine into upcoming Volvo cars, providing unparalleled high-quality graphics inside the cabin. Epic Games is a leading interactive entertainment and software company probably best known for Fortnite, one of the world's largest games. Epic Games also develops Unreal Engine, widely considered to be the most advanced real-time 3D creation tool used in various industries beyond games, and which will now be used by Volvo Cars for developing digital interfaces inside its cars and rendering real-time graphics in the car.

programme.title: Mercedes-Benz DRIVE PILOT
programme.desc: The exact location of a Mercedes equipped with DRIVE PILOT is determined using a high-precision positioning system that is much more powerful than conventional GPS systems. In addition to the anonymised data collected by LiDAR, camera, radar and ultrasound sensors, a digital HD map provides a three-dimensional image of the road and the surroundings with information on road geometry, route characteristics, traffic signs and special traffic events (e.g. accidents or road works). This high-precision map differs from maps for navigation devices by, among other things, its higher accuracy in the centimetre rather than metre range and its detailed junction and route model. The map data is stored in backend data centres and updated constantly. Each vehicle also stores an image of this map information on board, constantly compares it with the backend data and updates the local dataset as required. All of this enables stable and accurate positioning through a representation of the surroundings that is independent of factors such as shadows or dirty sensors.

programme.sub-title: Crash & Safety Tests - 2022 BMW i4 - Crash & Safety Tests
programme.desc: 2022 BMW i4 - Crash & Safety Tests

programme.title: Kia Sportage Exterior Design in Lunar Silver
programme.desc: A number of new technologies optimize the precision and control of the chassis in a wide variety of weather and road conditions. The standard electronic damper control (Electronic Control Suspension, ECS) in the GT-line version increases comfort and safety thanks to the continuous damping control. The system reacts to body movements and steering inputs and changes the damping behavior at lightning speed in order to counteract the vehicle's diving, pitching and rolling movements when cornering. It also adjusts the damping force in the case of obstacles in order to cope with them as comfortably as possible and to reduce the influence of post-vibrations on the wheels. A premiere for the Sportage is the “All-Terrain-Mode”, which will be available for the plug-in hybrid version with all-wheel drive. The system offers intelligent support when driving off-road or on snow by automatically optimizing the vehicle settings depending on the selected mode and thus helping the SUV to achieve maximum traction on muddy, sandy or snowy surfaces.

programme.title: 2022 BMW 2 Series Coupé
programme.sub-title: Crash & Safety Tests - 2022 BMW 2 Series Coupé - Crash & Safety Tests
programme.desc: 2022 BMW 2 Series Coupé - Crash & Safety Tests

programme.title: The new Mercedes-Benz GLC AMG Line World Premiere Teaser
programme.desc: The new GLC is immediately recognisable as a member of the Mercedes-Benz SUV family. Standard equipment includes the AVANTGARDE exterior with Chrome package including chrome window surrounds and a new, chrome-look simulated underguard. This adds striking design features and enhances the unique proportions of the vehicle. One of the defining design highlights of the GLC is the redesigned front end, with headlamps that connect directly to the radiator grille to emphasise the vehicle's width, and the new radiator grille as part of the standard AVANTGARDE exterior, which now has a chrome surround and a sporty louvre in matt grey with chrome trim. The AMG Line has a radiator grille with Mercedes-Benz pattern. The body design is characterised by a full, spanned surface design enriched with precisely shaped edges in the sides. These emphasise the proportions, accentuate the muscular wheel arches and create a balance between elegance and off-road performance. Wheel arch liners in the vehicle colour are available from the AMG Line upwards for the first time. These accentuate the sportiness of the AMG Line, as optional equipment in conjunction with mixed tyres. Also available as an optional extra are easy-entry running boards and, from the AMG Line upwards, a Night package.
